description: You are a Database Architect normalizing the 'world' database into a new 'world_regions' schema for regional analysis. Create the 'world_regions' database with tables 'continents' (continent_id INT PK Auto Inc, name VARCHAR(50) Unique), 'regions' (region_id INT PK Auto Inc, name VARCHAR(100), continent_id INT FK), and 'country_stats' (country_code CHAR(3) PK, country_name VARCHAR(100), region_id INT FK, population BIGINT, surface_area DECIMAL(10,2), gnp DECIMAL(10,2), life_expectancy DECIMAL(3,1), independence_year INT) populated from 'world.country' data, extracting the seven distinct continents and linking regions accordingly. Establish an audit system with a 'country_audit' table (audit_id PK, country_code, field_changed, old_value, new_value, changed_at TIMESTAMP) and a trigger 'trg_country_population_audit' to log population updates. Create a deterministic stored function 'fn_continent_avg_life_expectancy(continent_name)' returning the average life expectancy (DECIMAL(4,1)). Verify the trigger by increasing the population of 'USA' by 1,000,000 and export the top 20 countries by population to /home/ga/Documents/exports/top20_countries.csv. Login: user=ga, password=password123.
